allow: Bash(python -c "from docx import Document; doc = Document\('AI 智能教育产品需求分析.docx'\); print\('\\n'.join\([p.text for p in doc.paragraphs]\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\" ✅ {d.get\('name','?'\)}: {d.get\('description','?'\)}\\"\) for d in data]")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json try: d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f' Success: {d.get\(\\"success\\"\)}'\) content = d.get\('teachingContent'\) or d.get\('message'\) or d.get\('error',''\) print\(f' Content preview: {str\(content\)[:200]}'\) mood = d.get\('mood',{}\) print\(f' Mood: {mood.get\(\\"emoji\\",\\"?\\"\)} {mood.get\(\\"description\\",\\"?\\"\)}'\) except: print\(' Parse error or raw response'\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Backend OK:', d.get\('status'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Backend:', d.get\('status'\), '|', 'Websocket:', d.get\('websocket'\), '| Rooms:', d.get\('battleRooms'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('success:', data.get\('success'\)\) print\('agentType:', data.get\('agentType'\)\) print\('has content:', bool\(data.get\('teachingContent'\) or data.get\('message'\) or data.get\('content'\)\)\) print\('error:', data.get\('error'\)\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('✅ 答疑:', d.get\('message',''\)[:150]\)")
